reviews.review_text:
Excellent!!! 10 out of 5.
Best location and staff.
Amazing team of nurses, fast solving and careful with the treatment of patients.
Very satisfied with the service I received on Friday; all the staff treated me with great care, patience, and respect. Excellent!
reviews.original_review_text: Muy satisfecha de las atenciones que recibí el viernes, todo el personal me trató con mucho cuidado, paciencia y respeto, excelente

reviews.review_text: Best attention ever thanks Baptist urgent care Doral

This place is always very welcoming and attentive, they've been like this since I can remember bringing my mom and grandfather here in the past few decades and now on my recent visit from the security guard to the front desk to the nurses n the doctor who attended me for the very first time were all super nice n professional from beginning to end, I will definitely return to this location if ever needed to 🙏🏼 and I highly recommend it to anyone who needs the urgent care (with extra care) it's five stars and beyond for me.

I was seen within 10 minutes. Everyone from reception to the nurse and doctor were very attentive and professional.
Update: I have been here several times since my last review and it continues to be an exceptional urgent care
Great service, professional and friendly

I had a wonderful experience at Baptist Health Urgent Care in Doral. The doctors have incredible bedside manners and made me feel comfortable and well cared for throughout my visit. They were professional, compassionate, and took the time to listen to my concerns.
The nursing staff was equally amazing. The nurse who assisted me was friendly, attentive, and very caring. The entire team provided excellent service and made a difficult day much easier. I highly recommend Baptist Health Urgent Care in Doral to anyone in need of quality medical care.
Staff was amazing! Courteous, kind and very attentive. Dr.Goncalves, Rachel, Maria and Keonna. Especially Rachel.
Excellent service!

My wife, Maja Damovska, was seen today at this UC location. She was assisted by a wonderful nurse or medical assistant whose name I unfortunately did not catch, along with Dr. Goncalves Calo Nery. They were all exceptional.
My wife was treated as if she were a close family member—everyone was attentive, caring, compassionate, and professional throughout her visit. If we could give them 100 stars, we certainly would.
We have always had an excellent experience with the staff at this location, and today’s visit was another example of the outstanding care they provide. Thank you to the entire team for your dedication and kindness.

Baptist urgent care is the best.  I visited the Doral location, received in a professional, friendly, and caring manner.  The wait was less than 20 minutes to be taken in and begin the process.  Dr was very thorough and professional.  He listened to me and took his time in answering all my concerns.  Exams were done timely.  X-ray tech was great and kind. I was even able to go home with all the medication needed. They have an in-house pharmacy Kiosh.
I appreciate very much the excellent service you guys give it to me today and my visit today about this urgent care
reviews.owner_answer: Hi John - Your satisfaction is very important to us, so we are so happy to see your five-star review. Thank you so much for trusting Baptist Health with your care.

Hello Giselle - We greatly appreciate the five-star review of your Baptist Health Urgent Care visit. We strive to provide an outstanding patient experience, and your positive feedback helps us achieve that goal. Thank you for trusting our team with your care.

reviews.review_text: Excellent Service from the receptionist, nurses and doctor Lazaro Diaz-Nunez. Short wait time, and got treatment to make me feel better.
reviews.owner_answer: Hello Yelitza - We greatly appreciate the five-star review and thoughtful feedback about your visit. We strive to provide outstanding care and service because your well-being is important to us. Thank you for choosing Baptist Health for your healthcare needs.

reviews.review_text:
All the staff was attentive,  courteous, efficient and very professional.
It was a good experience!👍
I was seen quickly.  Doctor was very clear on his explanation and very caring as well.
Highly recommend them.
Excellent service

So thankful for the care they gave to my toddler! As parents we truly felt like the doctor, nurses, and staff cared and worked hard for a positive outcome. A scary scenario became a sigh of relief thanks to all Baptist staff!!
Super gast check-in. My nurse, Danae, was very professional and caring. After diagnosis was given treatment and medications. Everyone was very concerned with my well being and very professional.
I was very pleased with all the staff; the service was excellent, attentive, and quick, without much delay. Many centers should be like this one; my experience was very good.
reviews.original_review_text: Me sentí muy complacida con todo el personal una excelente atención y muy atento y rápido sin tanta demora deberían muchos centros ser como es ese mi experiencia fue muy buena

reviews.review_text: Very professional!

I met with Dr. David Rodriguez who was fantastic! The entire experience actually was fabulous! They are so high-tech and efficient that once you’re brought to your bed, they’ll update your contact & insurance information straight from the bed via teleconference, where you’ll also make your payment to check out with ease.

They also have a drug vending machine that will provide your meds with your insurance information already included. I downloaded the app from the room and I could visibly see my results within an hour of checking in. I was completely wowed by this experience and I will come back when I need to for sure!
Excellent
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente

reviews.review_text: Excellent service.
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atención.

reviews.review_text: The wait is a bit longer than I expected but the service was great.
Great service, friendly staff, and quick care. The team was professional and explained everything clearly. I had a good experience.
Very professionals fantastic service excellent for Doctor Jimenez and the rest of team
Very good experience

I recently visited the emergency room and initially had a positive experience at the front desk. The staff was courteous, and the check-in process was handled quickly and efficiently.
However, my experience changed once I was taken to the room for treatment of my open wound. While receiving care, the two nurses/assistants attending me were constantly laughing, which made me feel uncomfortable and as though I was being mocked or not taken seriously. Even though my injury may have seemed minor, every patient deserves to be treated with professionalism, respect, and compassion, especially in an emergency care setting.
I would like to recognize the doctor, who was professional, respectful, and attentive throughout the visit. Unfortunately, the same level of professionalism was not reflected by the nursing staff involved in my care.
I am supposed to return to have my stitches removed, but due to this experience, I am considering going to a different hospital location in hopes of receiving better patient care and service.
Excellent service 🙏
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atención 🙏

reviews.review_text: Level of care was excellent for those of us "in need of help" while traveling across the country!
Good and fast care!

Excellent attention, from the entry to the exit.
All the staff, very professional.

The care was excellent. Nurse Ana and another woman (I don't remember her name) were incredibly kind and professional, and Dr. David Rodríguez was excellent in his explanations and attention. The service was top-notch. I had never been to this urgent care center before, but I highly recommend it; the care and quality of everything were superb.
reviews.original_review_text: La atención excelente la enfermera Ana y otra chica no recuerdo el nombre súper amable y profesional y el doctor Rodríguez David excelente su explicación y su atención. El servicio de calidad nunca había venido a este urgent care pero lo recomiendo;  súper la atención y la calidad de todo.

reviews.review_text: Excellent

Excellent care and attention. Very good doctor and staff. Always very professional and fast. Best Urgent Care in the city!
Excellent care

Wonderful care! It was a long day as I had traveled 10 hours from Barcelona. They took me tight in and after tests determined I had bronchitis. They had a vending machine that dispensed the meds! Amazing care!
I only received help and kindness from all the staff! Thank you
reviews.original_review_text: Solo recibí ayuda y cariño de todo el personal! Gracias

reviews.review_text: Being the owner of a Surgery Center I have a lot to say…. From arrival to leaving already with the treatment in my hands the entire experience was exceptional. The level of care and professionalism is tailored to the highest standards. I want to personally thank the entire staff for taking care of me. Data entry, safety, privacy, technology, I even got a CT scan done. This center has it all. I left with the correct diagnosis, I was treated there and left with my medications without pain. Thank you
Staff were super friendly. Got in and out within an hour.
service is always amazing here, super attentive and caring staff!

To say that going to Urgent Care is a pleasant experience would be a lie, but in this case I’d have to reconsider my answer because they managed to make what was a difficult time for me a little less stressful.
The doctor was brilliant, but the best part was the phone call the next day to check how I was getting on.
All the staff looked after me wonderfully; they were very kind.
I’d recommend a 100% this Urgent Care in Doral
The doctor gave my son excellent care. Thank you!
reviews.original_review_text: El Dr. Le dio una excelente atención a mi hijo. Gracias!!

reviews.review_text: Excellent service. All the staff were very friendly and attentive to me the whole time. They made me feel comfortable and really helped me improve. I'm very grateful for the treatment I received.
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atención. Todo el personal fue muy amable y estuvieron pendientes de mí todo el tiempo. Me hicieron sentir cómoda y realmente me ayudaron a mejorar. Muy agradecida con el trato que recibi

reviews.review_text: They treated my mom verywell.  Very specific instruction on follow up care and medication steps.
Excellent service, the doctor was very kind.
reviews.original_review_text: Muy buena atención, muy amable el doctor

reviews.review_text: Excellent service from the entire team there, very kind. The nurse who drew my blood has excellent technique; there was no pain or bruising. The other nurse who gave me an injection was also excellent, and the woman who did the CT scan was very kind. Finally, Dr. Goncalves explained everything and answered all my questions with great patience. Thank you, excellent.
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atención de todo el equipo que ahí trabaja, muy amables, el enfermero que me sacó sangre tiene una excelente mano, ni dolor, ni moreton, y el otro enfermero que me puso una inyección también, excelentes los dos, y la chica del CT scan igual, muy amable, y finalmente el Dr. Goncalves me explicó todo y respondió a todas mis preguntas con mucha paciencia, se agradece, excelente.

reviews.review_text: The staff was very professional and knowledgeable.  They treated me with great care and concern.
Prompt service. Everyone was very friendly. Excellent.
reviews.original_review_text: pronta atencion.todos muy ama.bles excelente.

reviews.review_text:
As soon as I walked through the door I was treated with a smile and quickly checked in. Triage was quick and started preliminary test.  I was out in 2 hours having done scan, bloodwork, including IV.The doctor and nurses were amazing and have excellent teamwork and great bedside manners.
I was provided with paperwork with all the information I needed, and all medications. Registration and discharge also easy and fast.
Visited today around 9am for an ankle injury and was seen within minutes.  Dr was very professional, informative, and patient with all my questions.
Excellent care as always ❤️
Everyone was very nice. I was taken right away. The doctor was more than helpful and so is everybody else. I highly recommend it for anybody.
Thank you for the quick response an expertise.
Good service
reviews.original_review_text: Buena atención

reviews.review_text:
I had an excellent experience at Baptist Health Urgent Care in Doral.

From the moment I checked in, the level of service stood out. The front desk staff were professional, attentive, and welcoming—it felt like VIP service from the outset.

More importantly, my interaction with Dr. Yeisel Castanedo was exceptional. During this urgent care visit, for the first time in my life, I felt genuinely understood. She asked precise, relevant questions and took the time to assess my condition thoughtfully rather than moving through a routine checklist.

Dr. Castanedo was attentive to detail, clinically thorough, and demonstrated a level of care that is increasingly rare. Her ability to listen and engage meaningfully made a significant difference in the quality of the encounter. I left feeling confident in the diagnosis, the treatment plan, and the guidance provided.

Additionally, the ability to conveniently obtain prescribed medication on-site through the InstyMeds system was a practical and appreciated benefit.

Baptist Health Urgent Care is fortunate to have physicians like Dr. Castanedo delivering this standard of care.
Excellent service! And super fast! They prescribed the right treatment and I'm already feeling much better!
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atención! Y súper rápido! Me indicaron el tratamiento correcto ya estoy mucho mejor!

reviews.review_text: Excellent!!
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente !!

reviews.review_text: Excellent Service
Very professional and nice!
Very curtious and speedy service. Dr. David Rodriguez tiok really good care of me and explained very well the best optionn for treatment.
Excellent service. Very professional amd convenient
Everyone were attentive and I was there less than 30min. Great place. N great service.
Great care by the Dr and staff!

My experience here was excellent. I came in on a Wednesday afternoon, and within 30 minutes I was already being seen by a doctor. Another 30 minutes and i was getting meds from the vending machine. The nurses were friendly, professional, and made me feel comfortable throughout my visit.

Fast service, nurses and Doctors very professional., they really take care of my health. I really appreciate it.
Thanks, Baptist Urgent Care team.
Excellent service, friendly, professional, diligent, organized; their quality standards are truly high. Thank you.
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente servicio, amables, profesionales, diligentes, organizados, de verdad sus estándares de calidad son altos, gracias

reviews.review_text: Excellent service, they helped me a lot
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente atención, me ayudaron mucho

reviews.review_text: Great treatment everyone was great. The nurse that gave me the shots was amazing.

So many things i can say about this place. First some of the MD’s here are nonchalant with their replies which makes you question what is good or bad or just don’t care so there is no consistency here. Second, i hate when your front desk says something and we already refused “especially on animal part” to fill the docs and you still report it which that goes against being transparent. If thats the case, i wish this place goes down since i will be pissed off when you go against what you said in front of me saying is protocol. I worked at hospitals so i know your dam protocols and does not say you go against what you said to me and do things behind my back. You’re basically making up a different story and make things more complicated than it is. Overall i am also questioning the reviews on this place the standards and policies. I can definitely say also not animal friendly if thats how their process is to automatically report without customer’s consent. Don’t tell me because of rabies or other excuses since we are talking about different things so don’t bring what the county says when it has nothing to do with the current situation.

Excellent care
everybody involved give me excellent care it was very kind and service was
outstanding
Fantastic attention, from arrival to discharge, from all staff members, doctor and techs.  AS always!

You have no idea how happy I was to go there.  This place was a Godsend with Professional Care and Empathy. I wish I had know about this remarkable Medical Care, and .. OPEN on Sundays. Thank you Thank you and Thank you. You are #1
I felt well taken care of at every step and by everyone!  Thank you

I had an excellent experience at the urgent care center at Baptist Health. From the moment I walked in, the staff was welcoming, professional, and genuinely caring. The check-in process was smooth and efficient, and I was seen quickly without feeling rushed. The medical team took the time to listen to my concerns, explained everything clearly, and made sure I felt comfortable with my treatment plan.

The facility itself was clean, well-organized, and created a calm environment during what could have been a stressful situation. I truly appreciated the compassion and attentiveness shown by everyone, from the front desk to the healthcare providers. It’s reassuring to know there’s a place like this that delivers high-quality care with such kindness and efficiency. I would highly recommend Baptist Health urgent care to anyone in need of prompt and reliable medical attention.
The service was professionally human!
Refused to give me medication for pain. Attempted to charge me for naproxen in which is over the counter. Almost cut my fingertip off and was given stitches. Terrible I will not be returning
The service was very good.
reviews.original_review_text: Muy buena la atención

reviews.review_text: I’ve never received better care at an urgent care. I went for a possible broken toe and I immediately got an X-ray and further treatment. The staff was also incredibly friendly. Definitely recommend for quick treatment.
The care for the baby was terrible, but they were very attentive and careful.
reviews.original_review_text: La atención terrible en cuanto a la bebé, pero muy atentos y cuidadosos

reviews.review_text: I received excellent care.

From Anthony who greeted me at the front desk, Dari who assisted with eye testing, and Dr. Morales who thouroughly explained the diagnosis in plain English.  Special thanks and kudos to Sofia who compassionately assisted me throughout the entire process making me feel cared for and comfortable.
EXCELLENT! 👍
reviews.original_review_text: EXELENTE!👍

reviews.review_text: Maria the tech was so sweet and gentle with my wound care. Keonna the RN was amazing! She was caring, compassionate, and very knowledgeable. I felt like family thanks to them!
Everyone was helpful and nice! I received prompt attention and care. Highly recommended.
I was treated with respect. Everyone was very nice & maintained great communication with me, in my time there. I received top tier care!

I really appreciate the attentive and respectful way they receive patients. There are no long waits; I check in from my phone upon arrival, and then the nurse attends to me. The information is clear, and the service is prompt. I love that I can manage my payment right there in the office, and I can pick up my medications instantly.
reviews.original_review_text: Me gusta mucho la forma tan atenta y respetuosa con la que reciben a los pacientes, sin largas esperas hago el check in desde mi teléfono al llegar y después me atiende la enfermera. La información es clara y rápida la atención. Me encanta que en el mismo consultorio puedo hacer la gestión del pago y los medicamentos los reclamo al instante.

reviews.review_text: Excellent care, very professionals and Dr Diaz was incredible.. I highly recommend
Very friendly, efficient and professional team.

Recieving station and registration was on point, intake nurse was gentle and kind. However, I still dont know who or what type of doctor saw my dughter. No introduction, no name, No identification- not sure if she was an MD or PA, she went straight to diagnosis and never returned. Very unproffessional. I was dumbfounded. Not sure if the nurses at the station understand that the patients are there due to unwelcoming  circumstances. Nurses station was having a party. Maybe a retraining in patient etiquette is necessary.
Great experience, everything went smoothly. The RN was very sweet and caring along with the nurse practitioner. Excellent crew❤️
Excellent attention and service
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente Atención y Servicio

reviews.review_text: Amazing service and amazing nurses and techs !!!!! Nurses Rachel, Brunna zaimara and Ana were amazing and Annette too!!! Dr goncalves is the beeeeeeeeest

Excellent service, very professional, quick and excellent. I left with my medication, which is very important when people are sick!
reviews.original_review_text: Excelente Atención, muy Profesionales el servicio fue rápido y Excelente salí ya con mis medicamentos que es algo muy importante cuando las personas están enfermas!

reviews.review_text:
My experience with Baptist Urgent Care Doral was very positive.
The doctor, nurse, staff very caring, kind, and professional

I was very pleased despite the pain. The entire team that treated me was very attentive, kind, and gentle, and above all, they had a great rapport with patients. In my opinion, they were very professional. The removal of the glass fragment from the lens was a complete success, and my finger is perfectly healthy and unmarked, even though they had to make a small incision. Thank you.
reviews.original_review_text: Me sentí muy complacida a pesar de los dolores. Todo el colectivo que me atendió. Muy atentos, amables , gentiles y sobre todo muy buen carisma para atender a los pacientes . Para mí muy profesionales en su trabajo. La extracción del pedazo de vidrio de la mica todo un exito y mi dedo súper sano y sin marcas a pesar que tuvieron que picar. Gracias

reviews.review_text: Wonderful everyone!!!
Excellent all the staff

It's one of the most competent medical centers I've visited, where everyone is focused on the patient, where no time is wasted, and where everyone is professional from the moment you walk in. Thank you for the meticulous care; you leave with a 100% accurate diagnosis and medication. Thank you, please maintain this same level of discipline.
reviews.original_review_text: Es uno de los centros médicos más competentes que he visitado donde tidos están en función del paciente, donde no se pierde tiempo, donde todos son profesionales desde que entras. Gracias por esa esmerada atención donde uno sale medicado con su diagnóstico 100% , gracias mantengan esa misma disciplina.

reviews.review_text: Excellent service 👏

Tbh, the best Urgent care to go to. Everyone was so helpful and nice and the care was amazing. I had the best experience even though I was in pain. The customer service is the best I’ve ever encountered. Highly recommend.

The best Urgent Care at Doral .
They are very reliable and explain everything thorouly. .

I’m so glad I chose to bring my one-year-old to Baptist Health Urgent Care instead of Nicklaus Children’s Hospital urgent care. The staff, nurses, and physician were professional, kind, and took the time to explain everything and answer all my questions. I didn’t feel rushed at all, and I truly appreciated the care we received.
Very clean and friendly.
Although I have urgent care facilities closer to my home, I chose to go to this location due to the excellent service and care I have always received!
everyone was great. shoutout to the nurses for helping figure out what to have for lunch as well

We visited the urgent care clinic in Doral for an injury my son sustained. The care was incredible. Samantha Madera was super attentive and patient, teaching my son how to use crutches. 100% recommended.
reviews.original_review_text: Visitamos el urgent care de Doral por una lesion q tuvo mi hijo. La atencion fue increible. Samantha Madera fue super atenta y paciente, ensenando a mi hijo a usar las muletas. 100% recomendado.

reviews.review_text: Everyone was so extremely kind and helpful during my visit. I felt comfortable and taken care of. :)

reviews.review_text:
I went to this urgent care today and overall had a really great experience. I was brought in after only about 15 minutes, which I truly appreciated. The nurse and doctor I saw were fabulous, kind, professional, and very efficient. Once I was taken back, everything felt quick, easy, and I genuinely felt cared for.

The only reason I’m giving 4 stars instead of 5 is because of an interaction in the waiting room. I have the flu and was in a lot of body discomfort, especially in my legs, so I had one leg tucked under me while sitting. A security guard called out to me from across the waiting room, while other patients were present and told me to uncross my leg. When I asked for clarification because I was surprised, she responded in a condescending tone, saying “people sit there.” As a woman there alone and already feeling terrible, I did not appreciate being spoken to like a child. I’m also unsure if there is truly a policy against sitting that way when you’re visibly uncomfortable.

Hours later, I’m still thinking about how unpleasant that moment felt, especially while I was already in pain. Everything else about my visit was wonderful, and the medical staff were outstanding, but that interaction definitely affected my overall experience.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you so much for your review and positive comments about Baptist Health Urgent Care. We are sorry you were not happy with your experience in the waiting room. If you would like to speak to a member of the Patient Experience team about your concerns, please call 786-596-3750 or PatientExperience@BaptistHealth.net.  Thank you.
Hello Ligia - Our sincere thanks for the five-star review. We strive to provide high-quality patient care, so we are happy to hear that our team met your expectations. All the best to you.

reviews.review_text:
I’m really disappointed with my experience at this location. I came in with severe foot pain, swelling, and difficulty walking. Even though I explained that the pain was getting worse and affecting my movement, I was told it was likely a skin infection. They gave me antibiotics without doing any imaging or tests to confirm a diagnosis.

My symptoms continued to worsen to the point where I had to go to Jackson West ER. After finally receiving X-rays there, I was diagnosed with a medial sesamoid fracture — a broken bone that was missed entirely at Baptist. I spent an extra day with unnecessary pain, took medications I didn’t actually need, and risked worsening the fracture because I was told it wasn’t serious.

I’m sharing this so others know to advocate for themselves. I wish they had taken the time to perform proper imaging, especially since I couldn’t bear weight and had clear mechanical symptoms. I hope the clinic improves their evaluation process so that future patients don’t go through what I did.
reviews.owner_answer: Hello Vanessy - Thank you for making us aware of your experience, and we are sorry it was not positive. Please feel free to contact our Patient Experience team at  PatientExperience@baptisthealth.net or 786-596-3750 to discuss your concerns. Thank you.
